info.title: StaelTradeBot
info.description: This dotnet tool will use LLM's to find trade information on provided stocks. Used to check their health.

options.name: --inputStockInfo
options.description: Text file that contains what stocks to research and any initial data you want to share to the LLM.

options.name: --llmServiceToken
options.description: The token to use to connect to the LLM service. Currently only works with ChatGPT

options.name: --result-folder
options.description: The path to a folder that will contain results. Warning, existing content will be overwritten.

options.name: --emailServiceToken
options.description: The token to use to send emails. If not provided, no email will be sent. Currently only works with Brevo.

options.name: --brevoToEmail
options.description: Brevo recipient email address (required when --emailServiceToken is provided).

options.name: --brevoToName
options.description: Brevo recipient display name (optional). Defaults to 'Recipient'.
